div.style: background-color: #add8e6; padding: 35px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 160px;

img.style: position: absolute; right: 15px; top: 10px; height: 140px; opacity: 0.18; border-radius: 8px; pointer-events: none;

div.p: Análise de dados aplicada ao sistema ferroviário
